name: Welcome Series
description: 5-step welcome sequence with discount and SMS follow-up

steps.subject: Welcome to {{first_name}}! Here's what to expect
steps.body_html:
Welcome, {{first_name}}!

Thank you for joining our community. We're excited to have you here.

Over the next few days, we'll share some of our best content and exclusive offers with you.
steps.body_text: Welcome, {{first_name}}! Thank you for joining our community.

steps.subject: Our top picks for you, {{first_name}}
steps.body_html:
Our Top Picks

Hi {{first_name}}, here are some of our most popular products that we think you'll love.
steps.body_text: Hi {{first_name}}, here are some of our most popular products.

steps.subject: Our story — why we do what we do
steps.body_html:
Our Story

Hi {{first_name}}, we wanted to share a bit about who we are and why we started this journey.
steps.body_text: Hi {{first_name}}, we wanted to share our story with you.

steps.subject: A special treat just for you — 10% off
steps.body_html:
Your Welcome Gift

Hi {{first_name}}, as a thank you for joining us, here's 10% off your first order.

Use code: WELCOME10
steps.body_text: Hi {{first_name}}, here's 10% off your first order. Use code: WELCOME10

steps.sms_body: Hi {{first_name}}! Don't forget your 10% welcome discount. Use code WELCOME10 at checkout. Reply STOP to opt out.
